comments: Tracks listed are from the show but come in individual files with TV's comments. ***Update now a near full show .***

Ken Garner's In Session Tonight book lists Bon Jovi as session guests. In fact, the Bon Jovi performance on the show was from a concert recorded on 11th October 1984 in Ipswich, where the band opened for Kiss. The concert audio was engineered by Tony Wilson at Maida Vale, which may have caused the confusion for the band being listed as session guests. [https://www.discogs.com/Bon-Jovi-In-And-Out-Of-Love-Roulette-Live/release/1516353]
TV thanks Noddy Holder for sending him a copy of 'Flame' on video, and comments how strange it is to see himself on film sporting a 'walrus moustache'. He also calls them 'The' Slade!
The first ever Lie Back & Enjoy It is played, the choice of Rod Christian from Brighton.

sessions.details: one and only session (rpt). Recorded: 1984-10-05. No known commercial release.

track_listing.track: Uli Jon Roth & Electric Sun - 'I'll Be There' (LP - Beyond The Astral Skies)
